changeSet.author: lis-173-calibration-rule-types

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT character_maximum_length FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'clinlims' AND table_name = 'analyzer_qc_rule' AND column_name = 'rule_type'

changeSet.comment: LIS-173: widen analyzer_qc_rule.rule_type to fit CALIBRATION_* values

changeSet.author: lis-173-calibration-rule-types

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM information_schema.check_constraints WHERE constraint_schema = 'clinlims' AND constraint_name = 'chk_qc_rule_type'

changeSet.comment: LIS-173: allow CALIBRATION_* rule_type values through chk_qc_rule_type
